name: day-night-android
description: Native Android live shell for the complete DAY NIGHT delivery platform.

scripts.android:generate: npm run prepare:wrapper && rm -rf android && npx cap add android && npx cap sync android && npm run android:configure
scripts.android:debug: npm run android:generate && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:release: npm run android:generate && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
